packageRules.description: Lockstep anchor for the upstream Weaver-generated OTel keys. generated/otel-keys.gen.tsp is verified byte-for-byte against this package by the Nuke VerifyKeysLockstep target in CI, where the Actions GITHUB_TOKEN can read GitHub Packages. Renovate's app token cannot (npm.pkg.github.com only accepts classic PATs), and upstream releases are human-driven and one-way, so Renovate must not manage or look up this dep.
